About Us

Your Journey,
Our Passion

RK Groups is a trusted travel and hospitality company dedicated to providing comfortable, affordable, and memorable travel experiences across India and Nepal.

We specialize in spiritual tours, family vacations, hotel bookings, taxi services, and complete travel solutions. Whether you are planning a family vacation, group tour, or spiritual journey — RK Groups delivers with comfort and trust.

  • 100% Safe & Secure Travel Arrangements
  • Budget-Friendly Packages for All Groups
  • 24/7 Customer Support & Assistance
  • Specialised VIP Darshan Arrangements
What We Offer

Our Services

Complete travel solutions designed to make every journey seamless, safe and memorable.

🏨

Hotel Booking

Budget to luxury accommodations across all destinations.

🗺️

Tour Packages

Customized and fixed-departure packages for all groups.

🚕

Taxi Services

Comfortable cab services with experienced professional drivers.

🚌

Tempo Traveller

Spacious bookings for group tours and family outings.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Family Packages

Special packages designed for families with all age groups.

🕉️

Spiritual Tours

Sacred pilgrimages to Ayodhya, Varanasi, Gaya & Nepal.

👑

VIP Darshan

Exclusive VIP darshan at major temples with priority access.

🏔️

Group Tours

Organised group tours with full management & logistics.

What Our Travellers Say

★★★★★
